quarantined_tokio_carrying_profiles.proof_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_semantic_lint_core_tokio_fuzz_fixture cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync --features fuzz -i tokio
quarantined_tokio_carrying_profiles.rationale: The fuzz graph is not production proof; it is quarantined to OTLP wire-format fuzz helpers.
